tests.description: ATDD API tests for ConnectShyft capability-based route access and envelope contract compliance (RED PHASE)
acceptance_criteria_covered: Capability checks are enforced server-side at endpoint boundaries for role-sensitive ConnectShyft routes.
Capability checks are enforced server-side at service boundaries so denied writes do not mutate persisted state.
Success and refusal responses preserve canonical envelope keys for predictable client behavior.
ConnectShyft system error responses preserve canonical system error envelope semantics.

summary: Generated 6 FAILING API tests for story a.5 capability and envelope contracts.
